problem id: 5daa92e3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  11001111 -> 01100001
  00000110 -> 11000000
  11110001 -> 00011100
  01001100 -> 00000001
  11001011 -> 01101001
  01110100 -> 00000110
  01101011 -> 00101001
  11110010 -> 00011010
  01110111 -> 00000000
  11101111 -> 00100001

query: 11101100
predicted answer: 00000101
